description: secretx-k8s/README.md. The k8s backend has caller-visible behavior choices that diverge from peer backends: forbidden classification (currently buggy — see issue 1), 5xx handling, throttling. Callers writing retry policies need to know which SecretError variants are retry-safe. Fix: after fixing issue 1, add an 'Errors' subsection listing what becomes NotFound / Unavailable / Backend / InvalidUri.
title: README does not document Backend vs Unavailable error semantics for callers
